reviews.comment:
Una lástima que en medio del desierto no atiendan a la noche sólo iba buscando algo para tomar y sorpresa cerrado

(Translated by Google)
It's a shame that in the middle of the desert they don't serve at night. I was just looking for something to drink and, surprisingly, it was closed.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/12078125792324684984/reviews/ChZDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUN5cnFiU09BEAE

reviews.comment:
excelente atención y muy respetuosos!!!!

(Translated by Google)
Excellent service and very respectful!
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/12078125792324684984/reviews/ChZDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUN5eHEydkVBEAE

reviews.comment:
Excelente servicio, esta a mitad de camino entre Trelew y Comodoro, es un salva vidas si te agarra el viento en contra de la Patagonia que te seca el tanque en 400 km.

(Translated by Google)
Excellent service, it's halfway between Trelew and Comodoro, it's a lifesaver if you get caught in the headwind of Patagonia that dries out your tank in 400 km.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/12078125792324684984/reviews/ChZDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUN5cXBxcGFnEAE

(Translated by Google)

reviews.comment:
Muy lindo lugar ,limpio buena atención baños impecable.

(Translated by Google)
Very nice place, clean, good service, impeccable bathrooms.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/12078125792324684984/reviews/ChdDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUN5aktXcDBRRRAB

reviews.comment:
Si yo fuera dueño de esta empresa, me daría vergüenza que este establecimiento lleve el nombre de mi producto. Pésima atención, maltrato descarado hacia personas que quieren cargar combustible después de conducir durante horas y horas. Deplorables instalaciones.

(Translated by Google)
If I owned this company, I'd be ashamed that this establishment bears my product's name. Terrible service, blatant mistreatment of people who want to refuel after driving for hours on end. Deplorable facilities.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/12078125792324684984/reviews/ChdDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUN5OU9XQm1nRRAB

reviews.comment:
Es un buen lugar de paso, el tema es no cargar combustible (más que nada porque dicen que se arruinan los motores ahí por el combustible. No es rumor, porque nos paso) así que solo pasamos a comprar snacks y cargar agua para el mate

(Translated by Google)
It's a good place to stop, the thing is not to fill up with fuel (mainly because they say the fuel ruins the engines there. It's not just a rumor, because it happened to us) so we only stopped to buy snacks and fill up on water for mate.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/12078125792324684984/reviews/ChZDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUN5bExDQktREAE

reviews.comment:
Buen servicio...aparte de tener la característica de tener árboles, que permiten hacer un párate y estar un rato bajo sombra en medio de la estepa patagónica

(Translated by Google)
Good service...besides having the feature of having trees, which allow you to stop and spend some time in the shade in the middle of the Patagonian steppe
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/12078125792324684984/reviews/ChdDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUN5LU9YdTJnRRAB
